ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN {roles: ['Director']}]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver', votes: 1000000, tagline: 'A man becomes a hero'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What is the critical role of Martin Scorsese’s directorial involvement in *Taxi Driver*, and how does his subsequent review reflect the film’s broader cultural impact compared to his acting credits?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})
MATCH (p)-[a:ACTED_IN]->(m)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(reviewer:Person)
RETURN a.roles AS directingRole, r.summary AS reviewSummary
ORDER BY m.released DESC
